name: workflow-plugin-cicd
description: CI/CD pipeline steps: shell exec, Docker, artifact management, security scanning, git operations, AWS CodeBuild, deployment strategies
author: GoCodeAlone

stepSchemas.description: Executes a shell command and captures its output and exit code.

configFields.label: Command
configFields.description: Shell command to execute

configFields.label: Shell
configFields.description: Shell interpreter to use (default: /bin/sh)

configFields.label: Working Directory
configFields.description: Working directory for the command

configFields.label: Fail On Error
configFields.description: Fail the step when the command exits with a non-zero code (default: true)

stepSchemas.description: Downloads an artifact from a remote artifact store.

configFields.label: Artifact ID
configFields.description: ID of the artifact to download

configFields.label: Destination
configFields.description: Local path to save the downloaded artifact

stepSchemas.description: Uploads an artifact to a remote artifact store.

configFields.label: Path
configFields.description: Local file or directory path to upload

configFields.label: Artifact Name
configFields.description: Name to assign to the artifact in the store

stepSchemas.description: Builds a Docker image from a Dockerfile.

configFields.label: Build Context
configFields.description: Path to the Docker build context directory

configFields.label: Image Tag
configFields.description: Image tag (e.g. myrepo/myimage:latest)

configFields.label: Dockerfile
configFields.description: Path to the Dockerfile (default: Dockerfile in context)

configFields.label: Build Arguments
configFields.description: Key-value map of Docker build arguments

stepSchemas.description: Pushes a Docker image to a container registry.

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Full image reference to push (e.g. myrepo/myimage:latest)

configFields.label: Registry
configFields.description: Registry hostname (overrides image registry when set)

stepSchemas.description: Runs a Docker container and captures its output.

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Docker image to run

configFields.label: Command
configFields.description: Command to run inside the container

configFields.label: Environment Variables
configFields.description: Environment variables to set in the container

configFields.label: Volumes
configFields.description: Volume mount specs (host:container format)

stepSchemas.description: Runs a static application security testing (SAST) scan on source code.

configFields.label: Target
configFields.description: Path to the source code to scan

configFields.label: Tool
configFields.description: SAST tool to use (e.g. semgrep, bandit)

configFields.label: Severity Threshold
configFields.description: Minimum severity to report

stepSchemas.description: Scans a container image for known vulnerabilities.

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Container image reference to scan

configFields.label: Severity Threshold
configFields.description: Minimum severity to report

stepSchemas.description: Scans project dependencies for known security vulnerabilities.

configFields.label: Project Path
configFields.description: Path to the project directory

configFields.label: Tool
configFields.description: Dependency scanner to use (e.g. trivy, snyk)

configFields.label: Severity Threshold
configFields.description: Minimum severity to report

stepSchemas.description: Evaluates a quality/security gate condition and blocks the pipeline if it fails.

configFields.label: Condition
configFields.description: Template expression that must evaluate to true

configFields.label: Failure Message
configFields.description: Message to display when the gate fails

stepSchemas.description: Builds a frontend UI project (e.g. npm run build).

configFields.label: Source Directory
configFields.description: Path to the UI project source

configFields.label: Output Directory
configFields.description: Build output directory

configFields.label: Build Command
configFields.description: Build command to run (default: npm run build)

stepSchemas.description: Builds a project using a build configuration file (e.g. Makefile, build.yaml).

configFields.label: Config File
configFields.description: Path to the build configuration file

configFields.label: Build Target
configFields.description: Build target or task to execute

stepSchemas.description: Compiles a source project into a binary artifact.

configFields.label: Source
configFields.description: Path to the source directory or entry point

configFields.label: Output
configFields.description: Output binary path

configFields.label: Compiler Flags
configFields.description: Additional flags to pass to the compiler

stepSchemas.description: Clones a Git repository to a local directory.

configFields.label: Repository URL
configFields.description: Git repository URL to clone

configFields.label: Destination
configFields.description: Local directory path for the clone

configFields.label: Branch
configFields.description: Branch to check out after cloning

stepSchemas.description: Creates a Git commit in the specified working directory.

configFields.label: Working Directory
configFields.description: Path to the local Git repository

configFields.label: Commit Message
configFields.description: Commit message (default: 'automated commit')

stepSchemas.description: Pushes commits to a remote Git repository.

configFields.label: Working Directory
configFields.description: Path to the local Git repository

configFields.label: Remote
configFields.description: Remote name to push to (default: origin)

configFields.label: Branch
configFields.description: Branch to push (pushes current branch when omitted)

stepSchemas.description: Creates a lightweight Git tag at HEAD.

configFields.label: Tag
configFields.description: Tag name to create

configFields.label: Working Directory
configFields.description: Path to the local Git repository

stepSchemas.description: Checks out a Git branch, tag, or commit reference.

configFields.label: Ref
configFields.description: Git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to check out; either ref or branch is required

configFields.label: Branch
configFields.description: Alias for ref; used when ref is absent

configFields.label: Working Directory
configFields.description: Path to the local Git repository

outputs.description: The ref that was checked out

stepSchemas.description: Creates an AWS CodeBuild project.

configFields.label: Project Name
configFields.description: Name of the CodeBuild project to create

configFields.label: Source Type
configFields.description: Source provider type

configFields.label: Source Location
configFields.description: Source location URL or S3 path

configFields.label: Buildspec
configFields.description: Buildspec content or path to buildspec.yml

configFields.label: Environment Type
configFields.description: Build environment type

configFields.label: Compute Type
configFields.description: Build compute type

configFields.label: Build Image
configFields.description: Docker image for the build environment

configFields.label: Service Role ARN
configFields.description: IAM service role ARN for CodeBuild

stepSchemas.description: Starts an AWS CodeBuild build for a project.

configFields.label: Project Name
configFields.description: Name of the CodeBuild project to build

configFields.label: Environment Variables
configFields.description: Environment variables to inject into the build

configFields.label: Source Version
configFields.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA to build

stepSchemas.description: Checks the status of an AWS CodeBuild build.

configFields.label: Build ID
configFields.description: AWS CodeBuild build ID to query

stepSchemas.description: Retrieves CloudWatch logs for an AWS CodeBuild build.

configFields.label: Build ID
configFields.description: AWS CodeBuild build ID whose logs to retrieve

configFields.label: Tail Lines
configFields.description: Number of lines to return from the end of the log

stepSchemas.description: Deletes an AWS CodeBuild project.

configFields.label: Project Name
configFields.description: Name of the CodeBuild project to delete

stepSchemas.description: Lists builds for an AWS CodeBuild project.

configFields.label: Project Name
configFields.description: CodeBuild project name to list builds for

configFields.label: Sort Order
configFields.description: Build sort order

stepSchemas.description: Deploys a service using the specified deployment strategy.

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to deploy

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Container image reference to deploy

configFields.label: Strategy
configFields.description: Deployment strategy to use

stepSchemas.description: Performs a rolling deployment, gradually replacing old instances with new ones.

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to deploy

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Container image reference to deploy

configFields.label: Max Unavailable
configFields.description: Maximum number of pods unavailable during rolling update

configFields.label: Max Surge
configFields.description: Maximum number of extra pods during rolling update

stepSchemas.description: Performs a blue/green deployment with instant traffic switching.

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to deploy

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Container image reference to deploy

configFields.label: Health Check Path
configFields.description: HTTP path used to verify the new (green) environment is healthy

stepSchemas.description: Routes a configurable percentage of traffic to the new version (canary deployment).

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to deploy

configFields.label: Image
configFields.description: Container image reference to deploy

configFields.label: Traffic Percent
configFields.description: Percentage of traffic to route to the canary (0-100)

stepSchemas.description: Verifies that a deployed service is healthy and running correctly.

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to verify

configFields.label: Health Check Path
configFields.description: HTTP path to use for health checking

configFields.label: Timeout
configFields.description: Maximum time to wait for the service to become healthy

outputs.description: Image reference of the running service

stepSchemas.description: Rolls a service back to the previous stable deployment.

configFields.label: Service
configFields.description: Name of the service to roll back

configFields.label: Revision
configFields.description: Specific revision or image tag to roll back to (uses previous by default)

outputs.description: Service name that was rolled back

stepSchemas.description: Builds and optionally pushes a container image as part of the CI/CD pipeline.

configFields.label: Build Context
configFields.description: Path to the Docker build context directory

configFields.label: Image Tag
configFields.description: Image tag (e.g. myrepo/myimage:latest)

configFields.label: Dockerfile
configFields.description: Path to the Dockerfile (default: Dockerfile in context)

configFields.label: Push After Build
configFields.description: Whether to push the image to the registry after building

configFields.label: Build Arguments
configFields.description: Key-value map of Docker build arguments

outputs.description: Build operation result (deployed when handled by pipeline executor)
